global_requirements.requirement: Cada sección tiene exactamente 4 temas evaluables
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contar temas en blueprint de S01 = 4
global_requirements.evidence: V3 roadmap S01 defines T1-T4: Runtime, Entornos, Git, Calidad inicial

global_requirements.requirement: Cada tema tiene exactamente 2 subtemas evaluables
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contar subtemas en blueprint de S01 = 8 (4×2)
global_requirements.evidence: Current content has 5 learningOutcomes, not structured as 4×2 subtopics. Needs restructuring.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada subtema tiene 1 demo I Do y 3 ejercicios del estudiante
global_requirements.evidence: Current S01 has 1 demo (CodePlayground) and 3 We Do steps. Needs expansion to 8 demos + 24 exercises.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada subtema tiene 3 variantes de examen A/B/C
global_requirements.evidence: Current seed has 12 questions across 4 concepts (3 variants each). Needs expansion to 8 concepts × 3 = 24.

global_requirements.requirement: Cada sección tiene evaluación por tema, examen acumulativo y proyecto
global_requirements.acceptance_test: 4 topic evaluations + 1 section exam + 1 project increment for S01
global_requirements.evidence: S01 has selfCheck (5 questions = partial exam) and youDo (project). Missing: 4 separate topic evaluations.

global_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido de S01 en español peruano sin caricaturas
global_requirements.evidence: Content uses 'pega', 'chevere' appropriately in context, maintains professional tone

global_requirements.acceptance_test: S01 no involucra entity resolution o relationship scoring
global_requirements.evidence: S01 is about setup/environment — no ER or relationship content

global_requirements.requirement: Todo código debe ejecutarse o marcarse UNVERIFIED
global_requirements.acceptance_test: Código de S01 ejecutado en entorno declarado
global_requirements.evidence: CodePlayground demo verified in Iter 1 of Task 3. I Do code is bash commands (local-python env).

global_requirements.acceptance_test: S01 no usa datos reales de personas
global_requirements.evidence: S01 uses 'Maria Quispe', 'Estudiante' as synthetic names

section_requirements.requirement: S01 cubre: Runtime (intérprete, REPL, terminal, rutas, procesos, códigos de salida)
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido de S01 incluye explicación de intérprete y terminal
section_requirements.evidence: Existing content covers Python installation and terminal verification. Missing: REPL, process exit codes, PATH explanation.

section_requirements.requirement: S01 cubre: Entornos (venv, activación, pip, versiones, lock/freeze, compatibilidad)
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido incluye venv creation, activation, pip install, pip freeze
section_requirements.evidence: I Do step 2 covers venv creation + activation. Theory covers pip freeze > requirements.txt. We Do covers pip install.

section_requirements.requirement: S01 cubre: Git (repositorio, commits, diffs, ramas, PR, conflictos, recuperación)
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido incluye git init, commit, push, PR workflow
section_requirements.evidence: I Do covers git init/add/commit/push. Missing: branches, PR creation, conflict resolution, recovery.

section_requirements.requirement: S01 cubre: Calidad inicial (editor, Ruff, .gitignore, .env.example, secretos, README)
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Contenido incluye VS Code setup, .gitignore, .env, README
section_requirements.evidence: Theory covers .gitignore, README, .env. Missing: Ruff configuration, .env.example template, VS Code extensions detail.

section_requirements.requirement: S01 incremento/gate: repositorio ejecutable en equipo limpio + diccionario de datos + dataset sintético sin PII
section_requirements.acceptance_test: S01 You Do project produces a clean repo + synthetic data dictionary
section_requirements.evidence: You Do asks for repo with README/.gitignore/requirements.txt/hello.py. Missing: data dictionary, synthetic dataset. CP-N1-A esqueleton starts here.

section_requirements.requirement: S01 examen verifica: selección de intérprete, aislamiento, lectura de diff, manejo de secretos
section_requirements.acceptance_test: Exam bank covers: interpreter selection, venv isolation, diff reading, secret handling
section_requirements.evidence: Seed has 4 concepts: venv-purpose, gitignore, commit-message, pip-install. Covers isolation + secrets + diff (via commit-message). Missing explicit diff-reading question but commit-message covers related skill.

section_requirements.acceptance_test: CodePlayground demo funciona en browser-pyodide (suplemento), I Do en local-python
section_requirements.evidence: I Do is bash commands (local-python). CodePlayground demo is a supplementary browser demo (print Hello + age calculation).
Content starts from zero: install Python, open terminal.

platform_requirements.requirement: S01 carga sin errores en la plataforma
platform_requirements.acceptance_test: Playwright test 'section setup loads and shows tabs' passes
platform_requirements.evidence: All regression tests pass (11/11 in last run)

platform_requirements.acceptance_test: Demo 'setup' in SectionView.tsx renders and runs
platform_requirements.evidence: Demo exists with verified expectedOutput. Pyodide auto-loader handles imports.

platform_requirements.requirement: S01 tiene spec de examen detallado en learning_roadmap.md
platform_requirements.acceptance_test: Auto-evaluación section in roadmap has config table + concept taxonomy
platform_requirements.evidence: Roadmap lines 111-160: config table (4 conceptos, 4 preguntas, 70% min), concept taxonomy (venv-purpose, gitignore-rules, conventional-commits, env-reproducibility)

platform_requirements.requirement: S01 tiene HUD overlay navigation (FABs, sticky top bar)
platform_requirements.acceptance_test: Prev/next FABs + progress dots + compact top bar visible
platform_requirements.evidence: SectionView.tsx refactored with HUD FABs. Regression test 'HUD overlay integrity' passes.
scripts/regression.spec.ts test 'setup: no text element overlaps another' passes

contradictions_detected.issue: V3 defines S01 as 'Entorno reproducible y trabajo seguro' with 4 topics (Runtime, Entornos, Git, Calidad). Existing content titled 'Setup & Entorno de Desarrollo' covers similar topics but with 5 learningOutcomes, not structured as 4×2 subtopics.
contradictions_detected.resolution: Existing title and content are kept (authority: learning_roadmap.md is primary). V3's 4-topic structure is the TARGET for blueprint expansion. The 5 learningOutcomes will be reorganized into 4 topics × 2 subtopics during PHASE 3 (Blueprint).
contradictions_detected.authority: learning_roadmap.md is primary for section title/ID. V3 is primary for counting structure.
contradictions_detected.impact: Does not block PHASE 1. Blocks PHASE 3 (Blueprint) until resolved.

contradictions_detected.issue: V3 S01 mentions 'CP-N1-A esqueleto' as project increment. Existing S01 You Do is 'Reproducible Data Environment'. These are related but not identical.
contradictions_detected.resolution: Map existing You Do to CP-N1-A esqueleton. The 'Reproducible Data Environment' repo IS the starting point for CP-N1-A (Client Intake & Data Quality Script) which gates at S04. S01 creates the repo skeleton; S02-S04 build the intake script on top.
contradictions_detected.authority: V3 capstone structure defines the gate; existing You Do is the starting increment.

contradictions_detected.issue: V3 S01 mentions 'Ruff' as linter. Existing content mentions VS Code extensions (Pylance, Ruff, Jupyter) but doesn't teach Ruff configuration.
contradictions_detected.resolution: Add Ruff configuration to the content expansion in PHASE 4. Not a blocker for PHASE 0/1.
contradictions_detected.authority: V3 roadmap adds requirement; existing content partially covers it.
contradictions_detected.impact: Does not block PHASE 0/1. Tracked as content gap for PHASE 4.
